title: schizoloma orbiculatum
intro: Schizoloma orbiculatum, a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae, is a type of vascular plant that is native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The medicinal properties of Schizoloma orbiculatum lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Schizoloma orbiculatum can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and extracts, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
